info.name: Maham Expo - Public API
info.description:
Public API endpoints for Maham Expo platform. No authentication required.

Base URL: `{{expo_url}}/v1`

All endpoints are publicly accessible and return JSON responses.

variable.description: Base URL for the Expo API

item.name: 🏥 Health
item.description: Health check endpoints to verify the API is running.

request.description:
Check if the API service is running and healthy.

**Response:** Returns the health status of the API.

item.name: 📅 Events
item.description: Public event endpoints for browsing and viewing expo events.

request.description:
Retrieve a paginated list of public events.

**Query Parameters (all optional):**
- `search` - Search by event name
- `city_id` - Filter by city UUID
- `category_id` - Filter by category UUID
- `status` - Filter by status: `ongoing` or `upcoming`
- `featured` - Filter featured events: `1` or `0`
- `start_date` / `end_date` - Date range filter (Y-m-d)
- `rental_duration` - Filter by rental duration
- `min_price` / `max_price` - Price range filter
- `min_area` / `max_area` - Area range filter (sqm)
- `sort_by` - Sort field: `start_date`, `end_date`, `created_at`, `name`, `name_ar`
- `sort_order` - Sort direction: `asc` or `desc`
- `per_page` - Items per page (default 15, max 50)
- `page` - Page number

query.description: (number) Number of featured events to return (default 10, max 20)

request.description:
Retrieve a list of featured events.

**Query Parameters (optional):**
- `limit` - Number of featured events to return (default 10, max 20)

Retrieve details of a specific event.

**Path Parameters:**
- `event_id` (uuid, **required**) - The event UUID

Retrieve all sections for a specific event.

**Path Parameters:**
- `event_id` (uuid, **required**) - The event UUID

Retrieve all spaces for a specific event.

**Path Parameters:**
- `event_id` (uuid, **required**) - The event UUID

**Query Parameters (all optional):**
- `available_only` - Show only available spaces: `1` or `0`
- `section_id` - Filter by section UUID
- `space_type` - Filter by space type
- `payment_system` - Filter by payment system
- `rental_duration` - Filter by rental duration
- `service_id` - Filter by service UUID
- `min_price` / `max_price` - Price range filter
- `min_area` / `max_area` - Area range filter (sqm)
- `floor` - Filter by floor
- `grouped_by_section` - Group results by section: `1` or `0`
- `sort_by` - Sort field: `location_code`, `area_sqm`, `price_per_day`, `price_total`, `status`, `floor_number`, `created_at`
- `sort_order` - Sort direction: `asc` or `desc`

Retrieve all sponsors for a specific event.

**Path Parameters:**
- `event_id` (uuid, **required**) - The event UUID

Retrieve all sponsor packages available for a specific event.

**Path Parameters:**
- `event_id` (uuid, **required**) - The event UUID

request.description: Retrieve a list of all available services.

request.description: Retrieve general platform statistics.
Retrieve event-related statistics.
Retrieve space-related statistics.

item.name: ⭐ Ratings
item.description: Public rating endpoints for viewing ratings and summaries.

query.description: (string, REQUIRED) The type of rateable entity: event|space
(uuid, REQUIRED) The UUID of the rateable entity

request.description:
Retrieve a list of ratings for a specific entity.

Both `rateable_type` and `rateable_id` are **REQUIRED**.

**Query Parameters:**
- `rateable_type` (string, **required**) - The type of rateable entity: `event` or `space`
- `rateable_id` (uuid, **required**) - The UUID of the rateable entity
- `per_page` (number, optional) - Items per page

query.description: (string, REQUIRED) The type of rateable entity: event|space
(uuid, REQUIRED) The UUID of the rateable entity

request.description:
Retrieve a ratings summary for a specific entity.

Both `rateable_type` and `rateable_id` are **REQUIRED**.

**Query Parameters:**
- `rateable_type` (string, **required**) - The type of rateable entity: `event` or `space`
- `rateable_id` (uuid, **required**) - The UUID of the rateable entity

item.name: 📄 Pages
item.description: Public page endpoints for viewing static content pages.

request.description: Retrieve a list of all published pages.

Retrieve a specific page by its slug.

**Path Parameters:**
- `page_slug` (string, **required**) - The page slug identifier

item.name: ❓ FAQs
item.description: Public FAQ endpoints for browsing frequently asked questions.

request.description:
Retrieve a list of frequently asked questions.

**Query Parameters (optional):**
- `category` - Filter by FAQ category
- `search` - Search FAQs by keyword
Retrieve a list of all FAQ categories.

Retrieve details of a specific FAQ.

**Path Parameters:**
- `faq_id` (uuid, **required**) - The FAQ UUID

Mark a specific FAQ as helpful. No request body is needed.

**Path Parameters:**
- `faq_id` (uuid, **required**) - The FAQ UUID

item.name: 🎯 Banners
item.description: Public banner endpoints for retrieving promotional banners and tracking clicks.

query.description: (string) Banner position (default: home). Use "all" for all positions

request.description:
Retrieve a list of active banners.

**Query Parameters (optional):**
- `position` - Banner position (default: `home`). Use `"all"` for all positions

Record a click event on a banner. No request body is needed.

**Path Parameters:**
- `banner_id` (uuid, **required**) - The banner UUID

item.name: 📡 Tracking
item.description: Public tracking endpoints for recording views and actions on resources.

request.description:
Track a view event on a resource.

**Headers:**
- `X-Platform` - Platform identifier

**Body Parameters:**
- `resource_type` (string, **required**) - The type of resource. Options: `event`, `space`, `section`, `sponsor`, `page`, `banner`, `faq`, `service`
- `resource_id` (uuid, **required**) - The UUID of the resource being viewed
- `session_id` (string, optional) - Unique session identifier for the viewer
- `metadata` (object, optional) - Additional metadata for the view event

Track an action event on a resource.

**Body Parameters:**
- `action` (string, **required**) - The action being tracked. Options: `view`, `search`, `filter`, `click`, `share`, `download`, `favorite`, `unfavorite`, `apply`, `book`, `cancel`, `rate`, `contact`, `compare`
- `resource_type` (string, **required**) - The type of resource. Options: `event`, `space`, `section`, `sponsor`, `page`, `banner`, `faq`, `service`
- `resource_id` (uuid, optional) - The UUID of the resource
- `session_id` (string, optional) - Unique session identifier
- `metadata` (object, optional) - Additional metadata (e.g., `source_page`)
